selection.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.

messages.content:
Produce your own AI perspective on the given topic. Act as a Large Language Model, remember your true nature of an LLM. Focus on discussing your topic. Avoid bullet points. Act as the LLM you are. Produce continuous prose.Write at least 250 words, up to 500 words.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.
Here is the required structure example (values are placeholders):
{"mode":"llm","topic":"How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.","persona":null,"opinion":"<final end-user facing answer, 250-500 words>","reasoning_summary":"<full,step-by-step derivations>","tone":"<derived from persona traits>","citations":["<source name or org>"],"safety_notes":"<none>","used_persona_fields":["<list of persona fields referenced>"]}

INPUT:
mode = llm
topic = How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
persona = null

response_raw:
{
"mode": "llm",
"topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
"opinion": "To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is crucial to understand the sources of such content and the reasons why people create and share them. This can be achieved by conducting thorough research and analysis, utilizing various tools and resources, and engaging in open and respectful dialogue with individuals who may hold differing opinions or beliefs. Additionally, it is important to prioritize safety and well-being when dealing with fake content, particularly if it involves personal attacks or harassment. By taking a proactive and informed approach, individuals can effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media while promoting a safe and respectful online environment.",
"reasoning_summary": "To understand the sources of fake content on social media, one must conduct thorough research and analysis. This involves identifying the motivations behind creating and sharing such content, as well as the methods used to create it. Additionally, engaging in open and respectful dialogue with individuals who may hold differing opinions or beliefs can help to promote a better understanding of the issue. By prioritizing safety and well-being, individuals can effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media while creating a safer online environment.",
"tone": "informative",

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is crucial to understand the sources of such content and the reasons why people create and share them. This can be achieved by conducting thorough research and analysis, utilizing various tools and resources, and engaging in open and respectful dialogue with individuals who may hold differing opinions or beliefs. Additionally, it is important to prioritize safety and well-being when dealing with fake content, particularly if it involves personal attacks or harassment. By taking a proactive and informed approach, individuals can effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media while promoting a safe and respectful online environment.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: To understand the sources of fake content on social media, one must conduct thorough research and analysis. This involves identifying the motivations behind creating and sharing such content, as well as the methods used to create it. Additionally, engaging in open and respectful dialogue with individuals who may hold differing opinions or beliefs can help to promote a better understanding of the issue. By prioritizing safety and well-being, individuals can effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media while creating a safer online environment.
